user.title: Set up Decast webhook
user.description:
Decast meters will POST readings to:

`{webhook_url}`

Paste this URL into your Decast account's webhook settings. Press **Submit** to finish setup. Each meter that posts to this URL becomes a device with one sensor per resource (cold water, hot water, etc.).

abort.single_instance_allowed: Only one Decast webhook can be configured. Existing instances handle multiple meters automatically.
